texto: My embarrassment was complete. If I just had passed out, that would have been bad enough. But to make matters worse, Will had carried me outside, where everyone else was; everyone in my youth group had seen Will carrying me. I felt like melting into the bench on which I sat.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Annie Riley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “My embarrassment was complete. If I just had passed out, that would have been bad enough. But to …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, humorous-quotes, everyone pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: My embarrassment was complete. If I just had passed out, that would have been bad enough. But to make matters worse, Will had carried me outside, where everyone else was; everyone in my youth group had seen Will carrying me. I felt like melting into the bench on which I sat.
